items.verbatim: Tikkun Leil Shavuos: All-night learning program 1st night Shavuos. Features an interesting and varied program with a range of speakers. Details to be advised. items.suspected_error: Likely typo: 'am' should be 'pm'. A fast beginning the evening before Tisha B'Av should start at sunset (~5:09pm, consistent with that week's Shkia of 5:07-5:10pm), not 5:09am. This is the one substantive difference from the 'v2' file, which reads 5:09pm.

duplicate_diff: Confirmed via diff: 'wk 41 to 44 v2.txt' and 'wk 41 to 44.txt' are identical in every line except (a) the cosmetic 'SOURCE PDF:' filename header on line 1, and (b) the Fast of 9 Av start time in the Va'es'chanan week. The v2 file reads 'Fast of 9 Av: starts Wed. at 5:09pm; ends Thurs. at 5:37pm.' while the non-v2 file reads 'Fast of 9 Av: starts Wed. at 5:09am; ends Thurs. at 5:37pm.' The 'am' in the non-v2 file is almost certainly a typo — a fast beginning the evening before Tisha B'Av should start at sunset (that week's Shkia is 5:07-5:10pm), not 5:09 in the morning — so the v2 file appears to be the corrected version. No other differences exist between the two files.
